title: D&D 2024 Battle Master Maneuvers
description: Schema for data/maneuvers.json. A one-key wrapper ('maneuvers') around a map of maneuver_name -> entry, mirroring data/fighting_styles.json. All entries are description-only per the audit scope rule (D0-2): individual maneuver mechanics (push, trip, parry damage reduction, etc.) are spent-resource reactions/bonus actions resolved during play and do not change a rendered sheet field. The 'effects' array is allowed by the schema but is expected to remain empty; the maneuver SELECTION is recorded on the sheet via the grant_maneuver effect type, not via per-maneuver effect entries.
